product_service.description: One line: what this page sells.

usp_candidates.description: Differentiators the page leads with. Only what is stated on the page.

tone.description: Overall tone of voice of the page copy.

on_page_ctas.description: Call-to-action phrases present on the page, verbatim.

claim.description: Verbatim on-page trust string. Never invented.

has_numbers.description: True only if the claim contains a usable number.

expiry.description: Date YYYY-MM-DD, or 'unknown' if an offer is present but no date is stated, else null.

page_language.description: Detected language code, e.g. da, en, sv, no.
